scripts.benchmark:eager:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:eager:host --
scripts.benchmark:compile:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:compile:host --
scripts.benchmark:tx:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:tx:host --
scripts.benchmark:tx:compare:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:tx:compare:host --
scripts.benchmark:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:host --
scripts.benchmark:reinstall: npm run benchmark:clean && npm run benchmark:install
scripts.benchmark:mysql:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:mysql:host --
scripts.benchmark:postgres:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:postgres:host --
scripts.benchmark:quick:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run benchmark:quick:host --
scripts.benchmark:setup:host: npm run build && npm --prefix benchmarks run setup:host
scripts.publish:ci: npm run build && npm run release
scripts.test: npm run build && node tests/session.test.mjs && node tests/codegen.test.mjs && node tests/validation.test.mjs
